overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district during the blue hour. The player moves from a covered sidewalk past the NCART station, crosses a busy intersection, and explores an open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a red commercial building, approaching the NCART station

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: curved building facade with red trim and large windows
large glowing advertisement display showing animated content
green neon sign for Night City Area Rapid Transit
large curved elevated train track structure with orange lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk next to a red commercial building with holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward past the NCART station sign, with the elevated monorail structure becoming visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk along the path as the scene maintains a sheltered, urban atmosphere with mixed neon and natural lighting.

events.description: moving from covered sidewalk to open street approach with wider sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street approach, moving toward the intersection with increasing openness

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: red street sign indicating Longshore Street intersection
traffic light pole with red and green signals
tall modern glass buildings forming the downtown skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera moves from the covered sidewalk toward a major intersection. The NCART sign and elevated monorail track shift to the left while the Longshore Street sign comes into view. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road, and the massive glass skyscrapers of downtown become more prominent against the dusk sky.

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street
turning to look around the intersection while crossing, taking in the panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the surrounding traffic and cityscape

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: sleek black futuristic car with illuminated accents
massive vertical holographic advertisement display on building facade
distinctive skyscraper with a pointed spire and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the wide open intersection, crossing the asphalt street among other pedestrians. Futuristic vehicles drive through the crossing while massive holographic billboards illuminate the right side. The spire tower dominates the center skyline as the camera turns to survey the expansive downtown plaza, transitioning from the sheltered sidewalk to the open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown plaza with panoramic city views

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: moving through the open plaza while looking around at the surrounding architecture and city activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking across the plaza

entered.detail: small aerial vehicle flying between the downtown buildings
row of palm trees lining the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the open downtown plaza with unobstructed views of the skyline. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the towers, emphasizing the futuristic setting. The large holographic billboard and spire tower grow closer as the camera pans to take in the panoramic cityscape, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians moving through the neon-lit dusk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban sidewalk into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic downtown plaza. It begins under a covered walkway beside a red commercial building, moving past an NCART station sign as the elevated monorail structure emerges in the distance. As the camera leaves the shelter of the sidewalk, the scene opens up toward a major intersection where the Longshore Street sign appears and massive glass skyscrapers rise against the dusk sky. The movement then carries the camera across the asphalt street among pedestrians and futuristic vehicles, shifting the focus toward towering holographic billboards and the dominant spire tower. Finally, the view expands into a wide open plaza, panning across palm trees and the panoramic cityscape as a flying vehicle glides between the skyscrapers overhead.
